title: 12-week framework: binary coaching + Kingdom life choices
description: Develop a structured 12-week program for men using a binary problem-solving framework (God vs Satan) and a life-choices paradigm (Kingdom vs highest good or alternative), emphasizing results-driven transformation with humility and faith.
full_idea: Remember this. I think it would be better to say this is not for men who won’t comfort. This is for men who want results when are willing to put in the work to get them. And I just had an idea in the shower that I wanna share with you that is very intellectual and I think would be very powerful if turned into part of this 12 week program. Framework used to create it perhaps. Remember this coaching framework/objective if somebody is confused and they want clarity or they have anxiety what I need to help them do is get down to a binary choice of choosing God versus choosing Satan for the problem they’re in the same way that I did with Isaac Martin and his communication problem is the same essential process need to run on everybody if I can get everybody down to a binary that they believe makes sense I did my job. The faster I can do that better. Remember that life comes down to two choices seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, which is it another way of saying seek the highest good you can. And do so with humility and faith in the goodness and love of God, with hope that he uses all things for good. This brings peace. or the second choice is to do something different.
source_text: Remember this. I think it would be better to say this is not for men who won’t comfort. This is for men who want results when are willing to put in the work to get them. And I just had an idea in the shower that I wanna share with you that is very intellectual and I think would be very powerful if turned into part of this 12 week program. Framework used to create it perhaps. Remember this coaching framework/objective if somebody is confused and they want clarity or they have anxiety what I need to help them do is get down to a binary choice of choosing God versus choosing Satan for the problem they’re in the same way that I did with Isaac Martin and his communication problem is the same essential process need to run on everybody if I can get everybody down to a binary that they believe makes sense I did my job. The faster I can do that better. Remember that life comes down to two choices seek first the kingdom of God and his righteousness, which is it another way of saying seek the highest good you can. And do so with humility and faith in the goodness and love of God, with hope that he uses all things for good. This brings peace. or the second choice is to do something different.
